critiqued.title: Cryptochrome Radical Pair Terahertz Resonance Enables Quantum Compass Navigation
critiqued.kill_reason: Fundamental energy scale mismatch: 0.28 THz = 1.16 meV << 26 meV thermal energy at 300K. Thermal fluctuations overwhelm quantum oscillations by 22x.

critiqued.title: Enzyme Active Site Quantum Oscillations Create Catalytic Fröhlich Condensates
critiqued.kill_reason: Coherent Fröhlich condensates thermodynamically impossible at biological temperatures (requires 100M K)

critiqued.title: Photosystem II Exciton Coherence Lifetimes Are Extended by Terahertz Phonon Coupling
critiqued.survival_note: Core exciton coherence well-established (Science Advances 2025). Phonon coupling speculative but not impossible. Energy scales challenging but viable for sub-ps coherence.

critiqued.title: Microtubule Tryptophan Networks Generate Terahertz Quantum Information Highways
critiqued.kill_reason: Quantum information storage impossible in noisy biological environment; mechanism unfalsifiable; quantitative claims unverifiable

critiqued.title: Protein Folding Quantum Tunneling Events Are Coordinated by Terahertz Coherence
critiqued.kill_reason: Heavy-atom quantum tunneling coordination thermodynamically implausible at biological temperatures

critiqued.title: Biological Quantum Entanglement Manifests as Terahertz Bell State Oscillations
critiqued.kill_reason: Quantum entanglement impossible to maintain in biological environments; detection scheme technically infeasible

critiqued.title: ATP Synthase Rotor Dynamics Are Quantized Through Terahertz Cavity Resonances
critiqued.kill_reason: Quantum rotor dynamics unnecessary; classical conformational mechanics fully explains observed behavior. Energy level spacing << thermal energy.

critiqued.title: DNA Base Stacking Quantum Coherence Is Stabilized by Terahertz Sugar-Phosphate Oscillations
critiqued.survival_note: Core DNA physics sound. Charge transport documented. Multi-base-pair quantum coherence speculative but not impossible in principle.

critic_questions: For H3: What is the specific coupling constant between phonon modes and P680-ChlD1 exciton coherence? How strong must coupling be to extend coherence 3-8x?
For H8: What physical mechanism allows quantum coherence to persist over 3-8 base pairs despite thermal fluctuations and water interactions? Provide quantitative decoherence rate estimates.
General: For all hypotheses, provide rigorous energy scale analysis comparing proposed quantum effects to thermal noise (kT = 26 meV at 300K). How do mechanisms overcome thermal decoherence?

quality_gate.title: Magnetocrystalline Resonance Detection of Cryptochrome Radical Pair Dynamics
quality_gate.novelty_detail: Novel because physically questionable. Radical pair spin dynamics operate at EPR frequencies (GHz), not THz.
quality_gate.fail_reason: MECHANISM IMPLAUSIBLE: Fundamental frequency mismatch between THz spectroscopy (vibrational probe) and radical pair spin dynamics (GHz EPR phenomenon). Parent H1 correctly killed by Critic; evolution did not resolve core physical issue.

quality_gate.title: Thermally-Activated Quantum Rotor States in ATP Synthase F1 Complex
quality_gate.novelty_detail: Novel because physically impossible at biological temperatures. arxiv 2506.23439 explicitly demonstrates quantum rotor states irrelevant for ATP synthase.
quality_gate.fail_reason: MECHANISM IMPLAUSIBLE: Directly contradicted by arxiv 2506.23439. Quantized rotational state energy spacing << thermal energy by orders of magnitude. Tunneling probability ~0. Classical mechanics fully explains ATP synthase rotation.
